title: Simple Sudoku
description: Solve this simple Sudoku (3x3 version — 9 cells, digits 1-3, each row and column must have 1, 2, 3 once each). Write which constraint you checked at each step.

title: Hill Climbing Code
description: Write Python to find the maximum value in a list by checking neighbors one step at a time — simulate Hill Climbing. List: [2, 4, 6, 5, 3, 7, 4, 2]
